facts.text: Patient reports no chest pain, pressure, or tightness on morning walks
facts.transcript_quote: No, nothing like that.

facts.text: Occasional exertional chest twinge when overdoing yard work, resolves with rest
facts.transcript_quote: Once in a while I get a twinge if I overdo it in the yard, but it passes as soon as I sit down.

facts.text: Has not needed nitroglycerin spray in a long while
facts.transcript_quote: I have not had to use that little spray in a long while.

facts.text: Denies shortness of breath, ankle swelling, and paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnea
facts.transcript_quote: No, none of that. No swelling. I sleep like a rock, always have.

facts.text: Denies dizziness, lightheadedness, and falls in the past year
facts.transcript_quote: No falls. I hold the rail on the stairs like my daughter makes me promise to.

facts.text: Appetite good and weight steady
facts.transcript_quote: Appetite is fine.

facts.text: Patient retired in June after 60 years as a bookkeeper (not in labor force)
facts.transcript_quote: Sixty years of keeping books for people, and I closed the ledger for good in June.

facts.text: Lives with daughter and grandson; three people in household
facts.transcript_quote: my daughter and grandson live with me

facts.text: No difficulty affording food, medications, or transportation to appointments
facts.transcript_quote: No, we are comfortable. I saved carefully.

facts.text: Reports seeing/talking to close people less than once a week; stress level a little bit
Primary insurance is Medicare
Ex-smoker
Medication reconciliation performed
facts.transcript_quote: it has been a while since we did a proper reconciliation

facts.text: Simvastatin 20 mg discontinued (duplicate statin, empty bottle)
facts.transcript_quote: Simvastatin comes off the list today.

facts.text: Metoprolol 50 mg (old dose) discontinued
facts.transcript_quote: the old fifty-milligram metoprolol are off the list

facts.text: Continue atorvastatin 20 mg oral every evening, no missed doses
facts.transcript_quote: Let us keep the atorvastatin every evening, no missed days

facts.text: Continue metoprolol extended-release 100 mg oral in the morning
facts.transcript_quote: I take the hundred in the morning.

facts.text: Continue aspirin 81 mg oral daily
facts.transcript_quote: the baby aspirin, the eighty-one, and the losartan fifty — still every day?

facts.text: Continue losartan 50 mg oral daily
facts.transcript_quote: Every day with my oatmeal.

facts.text: Continue carrying nitroglycerin spray as needed
facts.transcript_quote: keep the nitro spray in your pocket

facts.text: Started metformin extended-release 500 mg oral once daily with dinner for type 2 diabetes
facts.transcript_quote: add a gentle dose of metformin, the extended-release kind, five hundred milligrams once daily with dinner

facts.text: Started hydrochlorothiazide 25 mg oral each morning for blood pressure and to lower potassium
facts.transcript_quote: I want to add hydrochlorothiazide, twenty-five milligrams each morning

facts.text: Counseled that metformin ER with food reduces GI upset; instructed to call rather than stop if bothered
facts.transcript_quote: If it bothers you, call me — do not just quit it quietly.

facts.text: Counseled to take HCTZ in morning and to report dizziness or feeling washed out especially on standing
facts.transcript_quote: If you feel dizzy or washed out, especially when you stand up, I want to hear about it right away.

facts.text: Counseled not to skip breakfast before morning walks due to low fasting glucose
facts.transcript_quote: I do not want you skipping breakfast before those walks

facts.text: Blood pressure 107/58 mmHg
facts.transcript_quote: Blood pressure today is one-oh-seven over fifty-eight

facts.text: Heart rate 96 /min
facts.transcript_quote: your heart rate is ninety-six

facts.text: Body weight 78.5 kg, BMI 27.8 kg/m2
facts.transcript_quote: Weight is seventy-eight and a half kilos, and the body mass index works out to twenty-seven point eight

facts.text: Hemoglobin A1c 5.45% (excellent for type 2 diabetes)
facts.transcript_quote: The A1c ... came back at five point four five percent

facts.text: Fasting blood glucose low at 66 mg/dL
facts.transcript_quote: Your fasting sugar this morning was actually on the low side, around sixty-six

facts.text: Creatinine 0.6 mg/dL (kidneys strong)
facts.transcript_quote: creatinine is zero point six

facts.text: Potassium elevated at 5.16 mmol/L
facts.transcript_quote: Your potassium ran a touch high at five point one six.

facts.text: Total cholesterol 226 mg/dL with LDL 148 mg/dL, higher than desired given cardiac history
facts.transcript_quote: total is about two twenty-six with the LDL at one forty-eight, which is higher than I want for a man with your heart history

facts.text: HDL cholesterol 57 mg/dL
Triglycerides 101.87 mg/dL
eGFR 148.95 mL/min/1.73m2
Urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio 15.6 mg/g
PHQ-2 depression screen score 0
facts.transcript_quote: the mood ones twice over ... Every score came back a zero

facts.text: HARK domestic abuse screen score 0
facts.transcript_quote: the safety-at-home questions ... Every score came back a zero

facts.text: DAST-10 drug abuse screen score 0
facts.transcript_quote: the alcohol and drug ones. Every score came back a zero

facts.text: Morse Fall Scale score 22 — low risk
facts.transcript_quote: your fall-risk score was twenty-two, which sits in the low-risk range

facts.text: Gingivitis with red, puffy, bleeding lower gums on exam
facts.transcript_quote: Your gums are red and puffy along the lower teeth, and you mentioned they bleed when you brush.

facts.text: Referral to dental clinic for cleaning and exam
facts.transcript_quote: I am sending a referral to the dental clinic for a proper cleaning and exam.

facts.text: Influenza vaccine (trivalent split virus, PF) administered
facts.transcript_quote: we will do it before you leave

facts.text: No prior bad reactions to flu shot (only sore arm)
facts.transcript_quote: Never. Just a sore arm and my daughter's sympathy.

facts.text: Known anemia stable, no new blood count; to monitor at next labs
facts.transcript_quote: Your anemia has been quiet too — no new blood count today ... we will keep watching it at the next round of labs.

facts.text: Follow-up in about 6 months for repeat labs; return sooner if chest pain, dizziness, or GI intolerance to new medication
facts.transcript_quote: I will see you back in about six months for repeat labs — sooner if there is any chest pain, dizziness, or if the new pill argues with your stomach.

facts.text: Plan to recheck lipids before adjusting statin dose
facts.transcript_quote: recheck before we change any dose

facts.text: Health and social care needs assessment completed

slots.procedure: assessment of health and social care needs

facts.text: Pain severity score 1/10 reported
Respiratory rate 13 /min
Sodium 137 mmol/L, chloride 104 mmol/L, CO2 28 mmol/L, BUN 18.73 mg/dL, calcium 8.74 mg/dL
Counseled on gum disease and heart disease connection
facts.transcript_quote: gum disease and heart disease are unfriendly neighbors

presence.rationale: No mention of social contact frequency or stress level.
